summary: Results-driven Senior Site Reliability Engineer with 8+ years of experience leading large-scale reliability initiatives in cloud environments, driving automation and efficiency to reduce operational risk and improve customer experience.

details: Designed and implemented highly available, scalable services in cloud environments using Azure, reducing operational risk and improving customer experience.
Led a team of 8 to deliver large-scale reliability initiatives, resulting in 30-35% incident automation potential across 20+ incident categories.
Automated ... reducing manual toil by 200+ hours/quarter through deployment, runbook, and remediation workflows.
Reduced MTTR from 45m to 9m by implementing robust logging, metrics, tracing, and alerting for complex distributed systems.
Scaled platform to handle 3x traffic with 99.95% uptime using Kubernetes and Terraform.
Developed and drove optimization roadmap with 4 engineering teams, resulting in 60% root cause identification of ADF trigger failures.
Created scalable onboarding framework adopted by 3 additional teams, reducing provisioning time from 5 days to 30 minutes using Bicep and PowerShell.
Implemented intelligent agreement management platform, achieving ~122K estimated annual cost savings through operational automation.
Designed and implemented logging, metrics, tracing, and alerting for complex distributed systems, ensuring signals were actionable and aligned to business impact.
Mentored and coached other SREs and software engineers on topics such as debugging, observability, incident management, and performance optimization.
Conducted blameless post-incident reviews, root-cause analysis, and follow-through on corrective actions to improve incident response and reliability best practices.
Worked with Operations and Engineers to fill any gaps in alerting and telemetry, ensuring system health monitoring and incident response capabilities.
Developed and maintained robust tooling and shared libraries adopted across multiple teams, improving CI/CD pipelines and deployment velocity.
Participated in and led incident response for Sev0–Sev2 events, triaging, mitigating, coordinating, and communicating with stakeholders.
Improved CI/CD pipelines and guardrails to reduce change failure rate while increasing deployment velocity using Azure DevOps and ICM.
Designed and implemented logging, metrics, tracing, and alerting for complex distributed systems, ensuring signals were actionable and aligned to business impact.
